name: Self-Taught Survivalist
description: Everything is self-taught as the animal lives in the wild with no help or assistance. Character mistrusts humans and other animals. Basic reading, writing and arithmetic are at a low level. Character can pick only one (1) Secondary skill. Has scavenged 3D6 times $100 in various equipment, most in poor condition.

name: Fringe Dweller
description: By skulking around the fringes of society the character picks up a rudimentary education. The character probably has a small number of human friends but distrusts people in general. Also knows Hand to Hand Basic. Knows 14 Secondary skills. Has scavenged 3D6 times $200 in equipment.

name: Mentor Trained
description: Adopted by a mentor who teaches and guides the character in some form of special training, often Ninjitsu. These characters will be philosophic about all creatures — some people are good, some bad, everyone deserves a chance to earn your trust. Ninja characters learn 3 military/espionage skills, 10 Secondary skills, and Hand to Hand Ninjitsu. Also has a choice of 3 ancient or ninja weapon proficiencies. Has scavenged and built 3D6 times $100 worth of equipment.

name: University Educated
description: Character goes public and is educated at a major university. Likes and trusts humanity in general. Education is four years of college. Select 3 skill programs and 10 Secondary skills. Although struggling for financing, at least 2D6 times $500 worth of equipment has been collected.
